courses.title: Course 2
courses.description: Foundational math mastery organized by concept.

units.title: Ratios and Proportional Relationships
units.description: Build understanding of ratios, rates, proportions, and percent relationships through clear concept practice.

concepts.title: Ratios
concepts.description: Learn how ratios compare two quantities and what the numbers mean.

concepts.title: Equivalent Ratios
concepts.description: Practice finding ratios that show the same comparison in different forms.

concepts.title: Unit Rates
concepts.description: Use division to find the amount for one item, one hour, or one unit.

concepts.title: Scale Drawings
concepts.description: Use scale drawings to compare real sizes and drawing sizes accurately.

concepts.title: Proportional Relationships
concepts.description: Recognize when two quantities change together at a constant rate.

concepts.title: Constant of Proportionality
concepts.description: Find the constant rate that connects one quantity to another.

concepts.title: Proportional Tables
concepts.description: Use tables to spot and complete proportional relationships.

concepts.title: Proportional Graphs
concepts.description: Read and interpret graphs that show proportional relationships.

concepts.title: Proportional Equations
concepts.description: Write equations that model proportional relationships clearly.

concepts.title: Proportions
concepts.description: Understand when two ratios are equal and how to recognize a proportion.

concepts.title: Solving Proportions
concepts.description: Solve for missing values in proportion problems using clear steps.

concepts.title: Percent Basics
concepts.description: Understand percent as a part out of 100 and what that means in simple situations.

concepts.title: Percent Increase and Decrease
concepts.description: Calculate how much an amount increases or decreases using percent change.

concepts.title: Multi-Step Percent
concepts.description: Solve percent problems that need multiple steps and careful problem solving.

concepts.title: Percent Relationships
concepts.description: Apply percents in real situations like discounts, tax, markups, and comparisons.

concepts.title: Ratio Word Problems: Multi-Step
concepts.description: Solve multi-step ratio and rate word problems by organizing quantities and reasoning through each step.

concepts.title: Unit 1 Mixed Review
concepts.description: Review the major ratio, rate, proportion, and percent ideas from Unit 1 in one mixed practice set.

units.title: Rational Numbers
units.description: Build confidence working with integers and rational numbers in number lines, operations, and real situations.

concepts.title: Integers
concepts.description: Learn what integers are and how they represent positive and negative values.

concepts.title: Compare Integers
concepts.description: Use number lines and reasoning to compare positive and negative numbers.

concepts.title: Absolute Value
concepts.description: Understand absolute value as a number's distance from zero.

concepts.title: Add and Subtract Integers
concepts.description: Practice adding and subtracting positive and negative numbers.

concepts.title: Multiply and Divide Integers
concepts.description: Use sign rules to multiply and divide integers correctly.

concepts.title: Rational Numbers
concepts.description: Recognize fractions, decimals, and integers as rational numbers.

concepts.title: Add and Subtract Rational Numbers
concepts.description: Add and subtract fractions and decimals in clear, organized steps.

concepts.title: Multiply and Divide Rational Numbers
concepts.description: Multiply and divide rational numbers with attention to signs and form.

concepts.title: Rational Number Applications
concepts.description: Apply rational numbers to real-world situations like money, temperature, and distance.

concepts.title: Integer Operations
concepts.description: Add, subtract, multiply, and divide integers with confidence.

concepts.title: Integer Word Problems
concepts.description: Apply integer reasoning to real-world situations involving gains, losses, elevation, and temperature.

concepts.title: Unit 2 Mixed Review
concepts.description: Review the major integer and rational number ideas from Unit 2 in one mixed practice set.

concepts.title: Course 2 Cumulative Review 1
concepts.description: Review the major ideas from Units 1 and 2 in a cumulative mixed practice set.

units.title: Expressions and Equations
units.description: Use algebra skills to write expressions, solve equations, and describe number relationships.

concepts.title: Expressions
concepts.description: Write and read expressions that show mathematical situations.

concepts.title: Properties of Operations
concepts.description: Use operation properties to reason about expressions more efficiently.

concepts.title: Equivalent Expressions
concepts.description: Recognize when two expressions have the same value.

concepts.title: Distributive Property
concepts.description: Use the distributive property to expand or simplify expressions.

concepts.title: Combining Like Terms
concepts.description: Simplify algebraic expressions by combining terms with the same variable parts.

concepts.title: Evaluate Expressions
concepts.description: Substitute values and find the value of an expression correctly.

concepts.title: Order of Operations with Variables
concepts.description: Evaluate variable expressions carefully by following the order of operations step by step.

concepts.title: One-Step Equations
concepts.description: Solve simple equations by undoing one operation at a time.

concepts.title: Two-Step Equations
concepts.description: Solve equations that need two operations to find the unknown.

concepts.title: Equations with Variables on Both Sides
concepts.description: Solve equations by collecting variable terms and constant terms before isolating the unknown.

concepts.title: Multi-Step Equations
concepts.description: Solve more complex equations by working through each step carefully.

concepts.title: Inequalities
concepts.description: Compare values using inequality symbols and reasoning.

concepts.title: Solving Inequalities
concepts.description: Solve one-step and two-step inequalities and interpret the solution set.

concepts.title: Graph Inequalities
concepts.description: Show inequality solutions clearly on a number line.

concepts.title: Inequality Word Problems
concepts.description: Translate word problems into inequalities and interpret the solutions in context.

concepts.title: Equation Word Problems
concepts.description: Turn word problems into equations and solve them step by step.

concepts.title: Equation Modeling
concepts.description: Model real situations with expressions and equations, then use the model to answer questions.

concepts.title: Unit 3 Mixed Review
concepts.description: Review the major expressions and equations ideas from Unit 3 in one mixed practice set.

concepts.title: Course 2 Cumulative Review 2
concepts.description: Review the major ideas from Units 1 through 3 in a cumulative mixed practice set.

units.title: Geometry
units.description: Study shapes, angles, area, surface area, and volume through visual reasoning and measurement.

concepts.title: Scale Geometry
concepts.description: Use scale ideas to compare lengths and drawings in geometry problems.

concepts.title: Circles
concepts.description: Build an overview of circle parts, measurements, and common formulas.

concepts.title: Circle Parts
concepts.description: Identify radii, diameters, chords, arcs, and related parts of circles.

concepts.title: Circumference
concepts.description: Find and compare the distance around circles using radius or diameter.

concepts.title: Area of Circles
concepts.description: Use formulas and reasoning to find the area inside a circle.

concepts.title: Angle Relationships
concepts.description: Use angle relationships to solve for missing angle measures.

concepts.title: Triangles
concepts.description: Build an overview of triangle types, angle relationships, and problem-solving strategies.

concepts.title: Triangle Classification
concepts.description: Classify triangles by side lengths and angle measures.

concepts.title: Triangle Angle Sum
concepts.description: Use the triangle angle-sum relationship to reason about angle measures.

concepts.title: Triangle Missing Angles
concepts.description: Find missing triangle angles using angle-sum reasoning and diagram clues.

concepts.title: Area
concepts.description: Build an overview of area strategies before applying formulas to specific polygons.

concepts.title: Area of Rectangles
concepts.description: Find the area of rectangles and related quadrilaterals using dimensions and units.

concepts.title: Area of Triangles
concepts.description: Use base-height reasoning and formulas to find triangle area.

concepts.title: Area of Polygons
concepts.description: Decompose polygons and apply area formulas to find total area.

concepts.title: Composite Area
concepts.description: Break complex shapes into simpler parts to find total area.

concepts.title: Surface Area
concepts.description: Find the total area covering the outside of a three-dimensional figure.

concepts.title: Volume
concepts.description: Build an overview of volume as the amount of space inside three-dimensional figures.

concepts.title: Volume of Rectangular Prisms
concepts.description: Find the volume of rectangular prisms using dimensions and unit cubes.

concepts.title: Volume of Composite Figures
concepts.description: Break composite solids into simpler parts to find total volume.

concepts.title: Geometry Word Problems
concepts.description: Apply geometry ideas in multi-step measurement and reasoning problems.

concepts.title: Unit 4 Mixed Review
concepts.description: Review the major geometry ideas from Unit 4 in one mixed practice set.

units.title: Statistics and Probability
units.description: Explore data, sampling, probability, and chance through questions and real situations.

concepts.title: Statistical Questions
concepts.description: Learn how to tell whether a question is statistical.

concepts.title: Sampling
concepts.description: Understand how samples can be used to learn about a larger group.

concepts.title: Population Inferences
concepts.description: Use samples to make reasonable inferences about larger populations.

concepts.title: Compare Data
concepts.description: Compare data sets and describe what the data shows.

concepts.title: Measures of Center
concepts.description: Use mean, median, mode, and range to understand data.

concepts.title: Measures of Variability
concepts.description: Use range, interquartile range, and mean absolute deviation to describe how data varies.

concepts.title: Distributions
concepts.description: Describe how data is spread out and where it clusters.

concepts.title: Probability
concepts.description: Use probability to describe how likely an event is.

concepts.title: Probability Models
concepts.description: Use organized models to predict outcomes and chances.

concepts.title: Experimental Probability
concepts.description: Use results from experiments to estimate probability.

concepts.title: Probability Simulations
concepts.description: Use simulations to model chance events and estimate probabilities.

concepts.title: Compound Probability
concepts.description: Find probabilities for situations with more than one event.

concepts.title: Probability Word Problems
concepts.description: Apply probability ideas to multi-step real-world questions and justify each conclusion.

concepts.title: Unit 5 Mixed Review
concepts.description: Review the major statistics and probability ideas from Unit 5 in one mixed practice set.

concepts.title: Course 2 Final Review
concepts.description: Review the major ideas from all Course 2 units in a full cumulative mixed practice set.
